major_common_issues: completeness: Missing execution detail or contains quality violations (15)
data_integrity: Data integrity checks are weak (8)

reviewer_table.title: Order created successfully via UI when order date, customer, and one line item are provided
reviewer_table.feedback: maintainability: Could be simplified
